exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your retirement transition forward
items: Calculate your exact retirement date and create a comprehensive overview of all your current retirement accounts and benefits
Research and compare Medicare plans available in your area, including Medicare Advantage vs. traditional Medicare plus supplemental insurance
Schedule a comprehensive financial review with a fee-only financial advisor who specializes in retirement planning
Create a detailed inventory of all your employer benefits and understand which ones end at retirement vs. continue with COBRA or other options
Meet with your HR department to understand your pension payout options and request official benefit statements for all retirement accounts
Research and document your Social Security benefits by creating a my.ssa.gov account and downloading your latest benefit statement
